abilities.name: Demise (Grave to Grave)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may place into base contact with a Remains marker within 8" and remove it to heal 4.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Bowled Over
triggers.text: Move the target 4" away, then move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Paralyzed
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Stunned token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Fling Monument
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Tomb Walk
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target and this model may declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Unnatural Speed
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.
